title: Port Facial quality, IQ, and dedupe plugin parity
operator_request: The operator needs Facial-quality image mining inside Handshake Ingest for LoRA dataset work; MT-019 proxy quality/dedupe is not enough.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Port deterministic native quality and dedupe behavior first. If an upstream feature requires unavailable model assets, emit explicit unavailable/degraded records instead of proxy-success labels.

scope.summary: Implement real native quality, image intelligence, and dedupe artifacts for Ingest using the MT-025 Facial registry/backbone.
base_scope: Port source-backed quality fields from the Facial app spec into Handshake rows and artifacts.
Implement deterministic image metadata extraction, exact-hash duplicate grouping, and review recommendations without proxy wording.
Add feature-family plugin modules for facet, python-ofiq, imagededup, and eDifFIQA-compatible outputs where native implementation is practical.
Materialize all outputs through Handshake ArtifactStore and keep original source files read-only.
Record unsupported model-backed quality features with source family, reason, and required configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Quality/dedupe rows no longer use handshake_native_proxy_v1 for implemented features.
Output fields map to Facial spec/source behavior with explicit source_family and feature_id.
Duplicate grouping is deterministic and stable across reruns for the same input order/content hashes.
Artifact content hashes are stable for equal inputs and differ when input classifications or source hashes differ.
Original images are never modified by analysis.
risks_and_controls: Risk: partially ported quality scores imply OFIQ/eDifFIQA parity. Control: source fields must identify native heuristic versus model-backed unavailable status.
Risk: dedupe collapses distinct images from filename alone. Control: exact duplicate grouping must prefer content hash and fall back to singleton with explicit reason.
Risk: large datasets reorder nondeterministically. Control: tests must assert deterministic sorting and hash stability.
verification: Fixture image tests for metadata/quality fields.
Duplicate grouping tests using repeated content hashes and missing-hash cases.
Deterministic rerun hash tests and artifact materialization tests.

manual_requirement: Required if this MT exposes or changes operator/model-visible Facial behavior.
